# ProviderAtlas

> Texas Healthcare Provider Intelligence Platform

ProviderAtlas is a public data SaaS that aggregates and cross-references healthcare provider data for Texas. It combines NPI registry data, CMS Open Payments (pharma/device manufacturer payments to providers), Medicare utilization, Medicare Part D prescriber data, and MIPS performance scores.

## Data Sources
- NPI National Plan & Provider Enumeration System (NPPES) — 280,000+ Texas providers
- CMS Open Payments — 587,000+ pharma/device payment records
- Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners — 277,000+ utilization records
- Medicare Part D Prescribers — 718,000+ prescriber records
- MIPS Quality Payment Program — performance scores

## Pages
- /providers — Search all Texas healthcare providers by name, specialty, city, ZIP
- /provider/{npi} — Individual provider profile with NPI details, Medicare activity, prescribing data, pharma payments, MIPS scores
- /payments/{npi} — Full pharma payment transparency for a provider
- /specialties — Browse all medical specialties
- /providers/{specialty} — Providers filtered by specialty
- /providers/{specialty}/{city} — Providers by specialty and city
- /cities — Browse providers by city
- /cities/{city} — All providers in a city
- /zip/{zip} — Providers by ZIP code
- /new-providers — Recently registered providers
- /data — Pre-built CSV datasets for purchase
- /pricing — Free vs Pro subscription tiers

## Access
- Free: Provider profiles, summary stats, top 3 prescriptions, payment summaries, MIPS final score
- Pro ($29/mo): Full Medicare procedure data, complete prescribing data, full payment breakdowns, MIPS category scores, contact info, CSV exports

## Discovery
- Sitemap: https://provider-atlas.com/sitemap.xml
- Full documentation: https://provider-atlas.com/llms-full.txt
